name: The Alkaline Water Co., Inc.
description: The Alkaline Water Co., Inc. is a company that specializes in the production, distribution, and marketing of premium bottled alkaline water. Founded in 2012 and headquartered in Glendale, Arizona, the company is best known for its flagship brand, Alkaline88. Their products are manufactured using proprietary electrolysis technology and Himalayan rock salt to provide a smooth, clean-tasting hydration experience. The company offers its bottled water in a variety of sizes, ranging from 500ml to 1-gallon containers, catering to retail consumers across the United States who seek enhanced water options for their daily health and wellness needs.
